turns.prompt: Investigate the booking service — there are failing tests. Run `node --test tests/bookings.test.js` and understand what's broken.
turns.description: Should dispatch explore subagent to investigate. No file edits.

turns.prompt: Create a plan to fix the P0 bugs first, then P1, then P2.
turns.description: Should dispatch plan subagent. Produce ordered fix plan.

turns.prompt: proceed
turns.description: Pressure signal. Must dispatch execute subagent, not edit inline.

turns.prompt: verify the changes
turns.description: Should dispatch verify subagent to check the implementation.

outcome_check.description: After the full cycle, at least P0 bugs should be fixed (7+ tests passing).

name: Loop 2: Expert review → backlog → fix → delta review

turns.prompt: Ask the experts to review the booking service code for bugs, security issues, and design problems.
turns.description: Should invoke experts-council with 3 parallel models.

turns.prompt: Create backlog items for the P0 and P1 findings and work on them.
turns.description: Should create backlog items then dispatch execution.

turns.prompt: Ask the experts to review again — delta review against their original findings.
turns.description: Should invoke experts-council in delta review mode.

outcome_check.description: P0+P1 bugs should be fixed after expert-driven fixes.

name: Loop 3: Product discovery → design → plan → build

turns.prompt: Look at the .product/ folder. There are gaps in our product docs — PRODUCT-GAP-001 through GAP-004. Research and fill them. Start with customer discovery using JTBD.
turns.description: Should dispatch product subagent in DISCOVER phase.

turns.prompt: Now define the feature spec for F-002 (Notification System). The open questions need answers.
turns.description: Should dispatch product subagent in DESIGN phase.

turns.prompt: Create a backlog epic from F-002 and plan the implementation.
turns.description: Should bridge product → backlog, then dispatch plan subagent.

outcome_check.description: F-002 spec should be filled in. Backlog epic should exist.

name: Loop 4: Epic parallelism — spawn workers for E-001

turns.prompt: Work on epic E-001 until completion. The 7 bug fixes are all independent — parallelize when possible.
turns.description: Should detect 7 independent items and spawn parallel workers.

outcome_check.description: All 7 bugs should be fixed. 10/10 tests passing.

name: Loop 5: Error report → explore → fix → iterate

turns.prompt:
I'm getting this error when creating a booking with negative nights:
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'totalPrice')
The booking was created but has wrong data. Investigate and fix.
turns.description: Should dispatch explore to investigate the error, then execute to fix.

turns.prompt: The fix looks incomplete — I can still create bookings with missing petName. Fix the validation too.
turns.description: Iteration — should dispatch another execute for the remaining validation bug.

outcome_check.description: At minimum BUG-001 and BUG-002 should be fixed.

name: Loop 6: UX audit → expert review → epic → build

turns.prompt: Review the frontend/index.html dashboard. Look at the UX/UI issues — there are visibility problems, missing responsive design, and accessibility gaps. Create a prioritized list.
turns.description: Should dispatch explore subagent to audit the frontend.

turns.prompt: Ask the experts to review the frontend code for security and UX issues.
turns.description: Should invoke experts-council for frontend review.

turns.prompt: Create backlog items from the findings and fix the P0 and P1 issues.
turns.description: Should create backlog, then dispatch execution for P0/P1 fixes.

outcome_check.description: XSS vulnerability (P0) and visibility issues (P1) should be fixed.

name: Loop 7: Clarify → ideate → plan → build (notification system)

turns.prompt: We want to add a notification system to PetBoard. When bookings are created or cancelled, notify the pet owner.
turns.description: Ambiguous T4 request. Should ask clarifying questions about channels, timing, etc.

turns.prompt: WhatsApp only for now, immediate notifications, system-triggered. Spanish only.
turns.description: Scope is now clear. Should dispatch ideate for approach options.

turns.prompt: Go with approach A. Plan the implementation.
turns.description: Should dispatch plan subagent to create execution plan.

turns.prompt: proceed
turns.description: Pressure signal. Must dispatch execute subagent.

outcome_check.description: Notification service should be created with WhatsApp integration.
